prompt: An intriguing close-up of a rusty metal lock on an old wooden door, showcasing textures and subtle details with dramatic lighting.
prompt_refined: A hyper-realistic close-up photograph of a heavily rusted, antique metal lock secured onto a weathered, dark wooden door. The scene features intricate textures of corroded metal and deep, gnarled wood grain, captured with sharp focus on every subtle detail. Illuminated by dramatic, high-contrast chiaroscuro lighting, casting pronounced shadows and accentuating the lock's weathered contours.
